algorithm: My algorithm selects the next node based on the node that has the shortest distance to the destination among the unvisited nodes, breaking ties randomly.
New algorithm: At each step, select the next node by choosing the node with the shortest Manhattan distance from the current node among the unvisited nodes.
Novel algorithm: At each step, select the next node by choosing the node with the shortest Euclidean distance from the current node among the unvisited nodes.
Novel algorithm: At each step, select the next node by calculating the product of the distances from the current node to each unvisited node and choosing the node with the minimum product.
New algorithm: At each step, select the next node by calculating the sum of the square root of the distances from the current node to each unvisited node and choosing the node with the minimum sum.
